About Me

A student who builds worlds.

I'm Foo Deson, a Game Technology student at UTeM. My interest sits at the crossing of game design and interactive media — I care about how mechanics, visuals, and storytelling come together to make something feel real.

I'm keen on building things — prototyping game ideas, picking up new tools, and jumping into challenges that push what I know. Always up for something new.

Creative & Design-Driven
Passionate Learner
Problem Solver
Team Player
Hands-On Builder

I'm Foo Deson, a Game Technology student at UTeM. My interest sits right at the crossing of game design and interactive media — I care about how mechanics, visuals, and storytelling come together to make something feel real.

03 — Work Produced

My Projects

C++MySQLSystem Design
Furniture Management System

A terminal-based system built to help a furniture store manage their stock and track sales. Staff can add products, record transactions, and pull up a full sales report — all through a simple menu. No fancy UI, just clean and functional.

GDevelop 5PhysicsPuzzle
Maze Ball

Tilt the board, guide the ball through the maze, and reach the goal without falling off. Pink-themed by choice. Uses real physics like friction and bounce so it actually feels satisfying to play.

JavaScriptProjectile PhysicsBrowser Game
Basketball Shooter

Drag to aim, release to shoot. The ball follows a real projectile arc — gravity pulls it down just like in real life. Score 5 baskets to win. Simple to pick up, harder than it looks.

UnityC#3D Runner
School Panic

Think Subway Surfers or Temple Run, but set inside a school. Sprint down the hallways, dodge obstacles, and collect coins. Built in Unity — third-person, 3D, and surprisingly fun to just keep running.

BlenderRigging3D Animation
3D Character Animation

Rigged and animated a 3D character in Blender from scratch. Set up all the bones so the character moves naturally, then animated a full action pose — bow drawn, ready to fire.

04 — Work Experience

Where I've Worked

Part-time roles taken on alongside my studies.

Part-Time
Honor Sales Advisor
AEON Bandaraya Melaka
  • Helped customers pick the right Honor phone — mostly around the X9d launch.
  • Explained features and deals in a friendly way — honest advice, no hard sell.
  • Built solid product knowledge across Honor's full phone and accessories lineup.
Part-Time
YSL Beauty Sales Advisor
Pavilion Kuala Lumpur
  • Represented YSL Beauty on the retail floor — perfumes, cosmetics, and skincare.
  • Gave personalised consultations while keeping the brand's premium feel.
  • Worked towards sales targets with a friendly, professional approach.
Part-Time
Export Furniture Marketing
Furniture Export Company
  • Introduced the latest sofa and mattress collections to overseas buyers.
  • Communicated product highlights and pricing clearly across different backgrounds.
  • Supported the full sales process from first look to buyer follow-up.
